commands.name: main-process-native-media-unit-tests
commands.stdoutTail:
▶ NativeScreenCapture DMA-BUF metadata validation
  ✔ accepts valid DMA-BUF metadata and pads native plane arrays (2.191542ms)
  ✔ keeps valid handles when optional device UUID metadata is absent or malformed (0.45425ms)
  ✔ rejects invalid plane counts, FDs, strides, and format metadata (0.478709ms)
✔ NativeScreenCapture DMA-BUF metadata validation (3.578041ms)
▶ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting
  ✔ normalizes display and window sources without changing source ids (0.671125ms)
  ✔ starts display and window captures with exact source id and kind and reports diagnostics (1.393083ms)
  ✔ forwards frames to renderer even when a native frame tap is installed (0.572875ms)
  ✔ reports macOS and Linux display/window capture capabilities from platform backends (1.508583ms)
✔ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting (4.293125ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing
  ✔ pushes the initial capture frame after publishing screen share (2.516958ms)
  ✔ prefers Windows shared texture handles over DMA-BUF and CPU frames (0.687709ms)
  ✔ uses Linux DMA-BUF handles before CPU conversion (0.544916ms)
  ✔ falls back to CPU frames when GPU paths are unavailable or rejected (0.468917ms)
  ✔ keeps screen-share audio published when screen video is unpublished (0.553791ms)
  ✔ replaces screen capture taps without releasing screen-share audio or duplicating priority (0.479167ms)
  ✔ forwards watch and unwatch operations with source, enablement, and quality intact (1.627166ms)
  ✔ reports VideoToolbox hardware capability from the native addon (0.5325ms)
  ✔ reports native voice engine capabilities from the native addon (0.4195ms)
  ✔ maps native addon microphone not-connected errors to the typed operation code (0.560208ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing (9.007958ms)
▶ WebrtcScreenPublish native frame routing
  ✔ prefers Windows shared texture handles over DMA-BUF and CPU buffers (2.107208ms)
  ✔ uses Linux DMA-BUF handles before CPU conversion (0.448834ms)
  ✔ falls back to CPU frames when GPU paths are unavailable or rejected (0.413166ms)
  ✔ replaces an existing publisher before routing frames for the same capture id (0.406ms)
✔ WebrtcScreenPublish native frame routing (3.859209ms)
